title: Inquiry into Post Office Horizon scandal faces five-year delay without extra funding
description: Police officer in charge says budget could reach £19.3m and nearly 100 more investigators are needed
content:
The police criminal inquiry into the Post Office Horizon IT scandal faces a five-year delay unless it is handed millions in extra funding and nearly 100 more staff, according to the chief officer in charge.

title: Woman shot dead outside Sheffield bar was innocent bystander, police say
description: Three people have been arrested on suspicion of murder after shooting outside One Four One in the city centre
content:
A woman shot dead outside a bar in Sheffield was an innocent bystander, police say.
Officers were called to the scene outside the One Four One bar on West Street in in the city centre at 2.45am on Monday after reports of a shooting.

title: Disorder erupts on Bournemouth beach as officers assaulted
description: DISORDER has broken out on Bournemouth beach with police officers reportedly being assaulted and a helicopter searching for culprits.
content:
Around 35 police officers have been spotted lining Bournemouth Pier Approach from around 6pm on Tuesday, May 26.
Dorset Police has confirmed that a large disorder broke out near Undercliff Drive and officers are making arrests while dispersing people... [1921 chars]

title: BP removes chairman Albert Manifold over allegations of bullying
description: His departure was announced with immediate effect after the board said it had learnt of ‘governance oversight and conduct issues it deems unacceptable’
content:
The chairman of one of Britain’s largest companies has been ousted after less than a year over allegations of bullying.
The board of BP said it had decided unanimously that Albert Manifold should step down immediately, citing serious concerns relatin... [3008 chars]

title: Insulin and metformin users issued warning over heatwave
description: Health officials have issued an amber health alert as the UK heatwave continues.
